title: The School Gate at Pickup Time

tree.setup: You walk past a school gate at pickup time. A parent waiting outside starts chatting with you.
tree.setup_zh: 你路过一所学校的门口，正是放学时间。一位等孩子的家长跟你聊天。

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 你也来接孩子吗？还是路过？
turns.text_pinyin: Nǐ yě lái jiē háizi ma? Háishi lùguò?
turns.text_en: Are you here to pick up a child too? Or just passing by?

options.text_zh: 我路过的。这里每天都这么热闹吗？
options.text_pinyin: Wǒ lùguò de. Zhèlǐ měi tiān dōu zhème rènao ma?
options.text_en: I'm just passing by. Is it this lively every day?

options.feedback: Unfriendly response to a casual conversation.
Doesn't answer whether you're picking up a child or passing by.

turns.speaker: npc
turns.text_zh: 每天都这样！孩子们出来的时候最开心了。你看，那边卖糖葫芦的老爷爷也每天都来。
turns.text_pinyin: Měi tiān dōu zhèyàng! Háizimen chūlái de shíhou zuì kāixīn le. Nǐ kàn, nàbiān mài tánghúlu de lǎoyéye yě měi tiān dōu lái.
turns.text_en: Every day! The kids are happiest when they come out. See, the old man selling candied hawthorns over there comes every day too.

options.text_zh: 真的很温馨。小时候我也很期待放学。
options.text_pinyin: Zhēn de hěn wēnxīn. Xiǎo shíhou wǒ yě hěn qīdài fàngxué.
options.text_en: It's really heartwarming. When I was little, I also looked forward to getting out of school.
options.feedback: Reflective — connects to a universal childhood feeling.
Misses the emotional beat of the moment.
Leaves abruptly during a warm moment.

tree.cultural_note: School pickup time (放学) is a daily ritual that transforms quiet streets into joyful scenes. Grandparents, parents, and snack vendors all converge. The tanghulu (糖葫芦) seller is an iconic figure — a thread of continuity across generations.
